title: tripsacum distichum
intro: Tripsacum distichum, also known as Eastern Broom Sedge, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Tripsacum distichum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Tripsacum distichum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use, and it can also be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
